subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth, thy gracious missive was perused with tearful eyes and a burning heart, while sighs and lamentations rose forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نمیقه آنجناب ملاحظه گردید با چشم گریان و قلب سوزان آه و فغان از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
